name: @borjie/blackboard-intel
description: BLACKBOARD-INTEL — wires blackboard posts into the self-improving loop and adds hybrid (FTS + dense + RRF) search across blackboard history for Mr. Mwikila. Three-axis quality scoring (groundedness, calibration, utility), capability-catalogue registration, meta-learning-conductor curator feedback, Postgres tsvector + GIN FTS, pgvector HNSW dense search, Reciprocal Rank Fusion (Cormack 2009). Tenant-scoped at every layer; audit-chained scores. See Docs/DESIGN/BLACKBOARD_INTEL_SOTA_2026.md.
